title: galium sylvestre subsp. lapeyrouseanum
intro: Galium sylvestre subsp. lapeyrouseanum, also known as Lapeyrous' bedstraw, is a subspecies of the Galium sylvestre plant, a type of flowering plant in the bedstraw family. Traditionally, Galium sylvestre subsp. lapeyrouseanum has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic qualities. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and supporting the digestive system. Herbal preparations of Galium sylvestre subsp. lapeyrouseanum include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to make teas, salves, and other medicinal products.
